pipeline_config.cadence: 2-3 posts per week across platforms until employed or funded

linkedin.audience: hiring managers, investors, professional network, regtech/fintech

content_triggers: New release or version bump on any project (Moddable, smalley.my, social MCP, etc.)
New article or thoughts post published on smalley.my
Open-source milestone (external contributor, star threshold, new repo)
Speaking engagement confirmed or CFP submitted
Job application sent or interview milestone
Meaningful technical achievement across any project
CV update or new portfolio case study added
pipeline_config.workflow: Claude appends drafts during sessions when content triggers fire. Mark reviews and approves before posting. Drafts accumulate across all projects — not just smalley-website sessions.

drafts.trigger: site launch + return to public presence
drafts.content:
Five years of building behind NDAs and client work. Now shipping in public again.

Chess engine, hexmap framework, AI developer tooling, and a few things still under wraps.

smalley.my if you're curious.
drafts.notes: First post after long silence. Must land before anything else.

drafts.trigger: site launch + return to public presence
drafts.content:
After several years focused on consulting and private infrastructure builds, I'm returning to public output. I've launched smalley.my to surface the work: protocol design, open-source developer tooling, embedded game systems, and the engagements that shaped them.

More to come. The pipeline is automated now. Will share the process soon.
drafts.angle: Re-establish presence, tease autonomous content system
drafts.notes: First post after long silence. Must land before anything else. No ask, no role signal — just presence.

drafts.trigger: social MCP server shipped and working
drafts.angle: Built a tool that posts to Twitter and LinkedIn from the terminal via Claude. Meta demonstration of the thing itself.
drafts.notes: Write after comeback post lands. Can reference that the comeback post was sent via MCP.

drafts.angle: Twitter: raw numbers and what was built. LinkedIn: methodology and what it proves about AI-augmented engineering leadership.
drafts.notes: Backdated trigger — article already live. Strong content for both audiences.

drafts.trigger: vanilla JS article published on smalley.my
drafts.angle: Hot take / contrarian dev opinion. Framework fatigue resonates with builder audience.
drafts.notes: Backdated trigger — article already live. Consider cross-posting full article to dev.to and linking from tweet.

drafts.angle: Twitter: technical showcase, embed demo. LinkedIn: open-source leadership, SDK architecture.
drafts.notes: Fires when next version ships. Include embed link or screenshot.

drafts.trigger: protocol design article published on smalley.my
drafts.angle: Twitter: thread format, one lesson per tweet. LinkedIn: single post summarising key takeaway for protocol teams.
